changeSet.author: hephaestus-provenance
changeSet.comment: The run's prompt-template version: a digest of the prompt scaffolding the sandbox received.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-provenance
changeSet.comment: The run's input snapshot: a digest over all materialised sandbox input files, job id elided.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-provenance

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_suppression_reason'

changeSet.comment: Realign suppression reasons to the ones that have writers: drop BELOW_THRESHOLD/LOW_CONFIDENCE (no such gate exists), rename POLICY_FLOOR_DROP to VOLUME_CAPPED (the policy floor is gone; a volume cap remains), drop the never-written REVIEWER_SIDE, and add the delivery-gate + composer reasons.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-provenance

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_source'

changeSet.comment: Realign feedback.source the same way: POLICY_FLOOR and FALLBACK are authors FeedbackSource cannot express, so the CHECK admitted values no code can write.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE feedback DROP CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_source; ALTER TABLE feedback ADD CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_source CHECK (source IN ('AGENT'));

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE feedback DROP CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_source; ALTER TABLE feedback ADD CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_source CHECK (source IN ('AGENT', 'POLICY_FLOOR', 'FALLBACK'));

changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich
FelixTJDietrich

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgname = 'trg_config_audit_event_block_mutation'

changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_config_audit_event_entity_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%WORKSPACE_ROLE%'

changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich

preConditions.onFailMessage: config_audit_event entity_type CHECK already covers PRACTICE_ACTIVE
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_config_audit_event_entity_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%PRACTICE_ACTIVE%'

changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE indexname = 'ix_config_audit_event_occurred'

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Create the unified LLM usage ledger (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Per-workspace monthly LLM budget cap in USD; null = uncapped (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: llm_usage_event missing — nothing to backfill into

changeSet.comment: Backfill the LLM usage ledger from agent_job (#1368)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO llm_usage_event (id, workspace_id, job_type, source_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_calls, cost_usd, occurred_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), j.workspace_id, j.job_type, j.id, j.llm_model, COALESCE(j.llm_total_input_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_total_output_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_cache_read_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_cache_write_tokens, 0), GREATEST(COALESCE(j.llm_total_calls, 1), 1), -- Guarded cast (#1368 migration-correctness fix): llm_cost_usd is a DOUBLE PRECISION -- column, so historical bad data (a divide-by-zero bug upstream producing NaN/Infinity, -- or any value at/above the NUMERIC(12,6) column's 6-integer-digit capacity) would abort -- the whole migration mid-CAST. Store NULL (UNPRICED, per changeset -9 in -- 1784566728230) instead of throwing. -- -- Rounding-boundary fix (#1368 fix wave): the bound below MUST be checked against the -- value ROUNDED to the column's 6-decimal scale, not the raw double. A raw value like -- 999999.9999999 passes "< 1000000" unrounded, but ROUND(...,6) carries it to -- 1000000.000000 — 7 integer digits, which overflows NUMERIC(12,6) and aborts the CAST -- in the ELSE branch below. Rounding once here (and reusing that same rounded value in -- ELSE) makes the bound check and the stored value agree. CASE WHEN j.llm_cost_usd IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN j.llm_cost_usd = 'NaN'::double precision THEN NULL WHEN j.llm_cost_usd = 'Infinity'::double precision THEN NULL WHEN j.llm_cost_usd = '-Infinity'::double precision THEN NULL WHEN ROUND(j.llm_cost_usd::numeric, 6) >= 1000000 OR ROUND(j.llm_cost_usd::numeric, 6) <= -1000000 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(j.llm_cost_usd::numeric, 6) END, COALESCE(j.completed_at, j.created_at) FROM agent_job j WHERE (COALESCE(j.llm_total_calls, 0) > 0 OR j.llm_cost_usd IS NOT NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM llm_usage_event e WHERE e.source_id = j.id);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: llm_usage_event missing — nothing to backfill into

changeSet.comment: Backfill the LLM usage ledger from chat_message.metadata (#1368)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO llm_usage_event (id, workspace_id, job_type, source_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_calls, cost_usd, occurred_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.workspace_id, 'MENTOR_TURN', m.id, NULLIF(COALESCE(m.metadata->>'model', ''), ''), COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'input') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'input' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'input')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'inputTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'inputTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'inputTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'output') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'output' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'output')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'outputTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'outputTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'outputTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, 1, -- Rounding-boundary fix (#1368 fix wave): the regex's `[0-9]{1,6}` integer-part guard -- only bounds the UNROUNDED string — "999999.9999999" (6 integer digits) matches, but -- casting straight to numeric(12,6) rounds it to 1000000.000000 (7 integer digits), -- overflowing the column and aborting the migration. Round into an unconstrained numeric -- first, then bound-check the ROUNDED value before storing it. CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'costUsd') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'costUsd' ~ '^-?[0-9]{1,6}(\.[0-9]+)?$' AND ABS(ROUND((m.metadata->>'costUsd')::numeric, 6)) < 1000000 THEN ROUND((m.metadata->>'costUsd')::numeric, 6) END, m.created_at FROM chat_message m JOIN chat_thread t ON t.id = m.thread_id WHERE m.metadata IS NOT NULL AND (m.metadata->>'costUsd' IS NOT NULL OR m.metadata->'usage'->>'input' IS NOT NULL OR m.metadata->>'inputTokens' IS NOT NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM llm_usage_event e WHERE e.source_id = m.id);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: config_audit_event entity_type CHECK already covers WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_config_audit_event_entity_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET%'

changeSet.comment: Admit WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET on the config-audit trail (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Instance-owned LLM provider connection (endpoint + credential + egress) (#1368)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE llm_connection ADD CONSTRAINT ck_llm_connection_api_protocol CHECK (api_protocol IN ('openai-completions','openai-responses','azure-openai-responses','anthropic-messages'));

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Instance-curated model (opaque upstream id + capability + lifecycle + visibility) (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Effective-dated price rows for an instance model; tri-state pricing_mode (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Per-workspace grant of a GRANTED-visibility instance model (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Workspace-owned BYO LLM connection (tenant-scoped) (#1368)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE workspace_llm_connection ADD CONSTRAINT ck_ws_llm_connection_api_protocol CHECK (api_protocol IN ('openai-completions','openai-responses','azure-openai-responses','anthropic-messages'));

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Workspace-owned BYO model with inline current price (tenant-scoped) (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Instance LLM settings: egress allowlist, BYO enable, default unpriced policy (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Demote agent_config to a model binding (instance XOR workspace model) (#1368)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE agent_config ADD CONSTRAINT ck_agent_config_single_binding CHECK (NOT (instance_model_id IS NOT NULL AND workspace_model_id IS NOT NULL));

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Ledger pricing_state + reasoning_tokens + funding_source + price provenance (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Ledger provenance: applied_workspace_model_id + frozen per-1M rate snapshot (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: ck_auth_event_event_type already admits the LLM catalog event types
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_auth_event_event_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%LLM_SETTINGS_CHANGED%'

changeSet.comment: Widen ck_auth_event_event_type to admit the instance LLM catalog's audit events (#1368)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE auth_event DROP CONSTRAINT ck_auth_event_event_type; ALTER TABLE auth_event ADD CONSTRAINT ck_auth_event_event_type CHECK (event_type IN ( 'LOGIN', 'LOGIN_FAILED', 'LOGOUT', 'TOKEN_REFRESH', 'JWT_REVOKED', 'IDENTITY_LINKED', 'IDENTITY_UNLINKED', 'IMPERSONATION_BEGIN', 'IMPERSONATION_END', 'ACCOUNT_DELETED', 'EXPORT_REQUESTED', 'APP_ROLE_CHANGED', 'RESEARCH_CONSENT_REVOKED', 'LLM_CONNECTION_CREATED', 'LLM_CONNECTION_UPDATED', 'LLM_CONNECTION_DELETED', 'LLM_MODEL_CREATED', 'LLM_MODEL_UPDATED', 'LLM_MODEL_DELETED', 'LLM_MODEL_PRICE_CHANGED', 'LLM_MODEL_SHARING_CHANGED', 'LLM_SETTINGS_CHANGED' ));

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: config_audit_event entity_type CHECK already covers WORKSPACE_LLM_MODEL
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_config_audit_event_entity_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%WORKSPACE_LLM_MODEL%'

changeSet.comment: Admit WORKSPACE_LLM_CONNECTION and WORKSPACE_LLM_MODEL on the config-audit trail (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Unique (connection_id, upstream_model_id) on llm_model — no shadowing duplicate (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Unique (connection_id, upstream_model_id) on workspace_llm_model — no shadowing duplicate (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'llm_usage_event' AND column_name = 'cost_usd' AND numeric_precision = 18

changeSet.comment: Widen llm_usage_event.cost_usd from NUMERIC(12,6) to NUMERIC(18,6) (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Oldest-first QUEUED poll candidates (#1368 fix wave)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Per-config RUNNING count for the poll query's concurrency-cap fairness predicate (#1368 fix wave)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: When a QUEUED job becomes eligible for a poll-loop claim; backoff-computed on requeue (#1368 hardening)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE agent_job ADD COLUMN available_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(); ALTER TABLE agent_job ALTER COLUMN available_at DROP DEFAULT;

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Replace the queued-oldest-first index with one ordered on available_at, the new claim-eligibility predicate (#1368 hardening; both indexes are branch-local, so drop+create lands in one changeset)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_agent_job_status'

changeSet.comment: CHECK the six documented AgentJobStatus values at the storage layer (#1368 hardening)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE agent_job ADD CONSTRAINT ck_agent_job_status CHECK (status IN ('QUEUED','RUNNING','COMPLETED','FAILED','TIMED_OUT','CANCELLED'));

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE agent_job DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS ck_agent_job_status;

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Bounded attempt counter for the delivery-recovery sweep (AgentJobZombieSweeper#recoverStuckDeliveries) (#1368 hardening)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'agent_job' AND reloptions IS NOT NULL AND array_to_string(reloptions, ',') LIKE '%autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor%'

changeSet.comment: Oban's documented autovacuum recommendation, adapted: a high-churn queue table needs vacuum triggered by absolute row-change count, not the default 20% scale factor (#1368 hardening — pressure-test verdict Tier 1 #1)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE agent_job SET (autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor = 0, autovacuum_vacuum_threshold = 500);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'worker_registry' AND reloptions IS NOT NULL AND array_to_string(reloptions, ',') LIKE '%autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor%'

changeSet.comment: Same autovacuum tuning for worker_registry — small table, heartbeat-rate UPDATEs (#1368 hardening)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE worker_registry SET (autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor = 0, autovacuum_vacuum_threshold = 100);

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Support AgentJobZombieSweeper#recoverStuckDeliveries' stuck-PENDING-delivery scan (#1368 hardening)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Support AgentJobRetentionService's terminal-row batch scans (strip + delete) (#1368 hardening)
